gxcr Error Codes
[gxcr User-Level Crypto Acceleration API]


Enumerations

enum  gxcr_error_codes {
  GXCR_NO_ERROR = 0, GXCR_OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED = -1300, GXCR_BAD_PARAM = -1301, GXCR_ERR_INVAL_MEMORY_SIZE = -1302,
  GXCR_ERR_INVAL_TOKEN_SIZE = -1303
}
 Error codes returned by gxcr_ API calls. More...

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum gxcr_error_codes

Error codes returned by gxcr_ API calls.

Enumerator:
GXCR_NO_ERROR  Operation successfully completed.

GXCR_OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED  The requested cipher/digest combination is not supported.

GXCR_BAD_PARAM  An invalid parameter was supplied to a setup function.

GXCR_ERR_INVAL_MEMORY_SIZE  Not enough memory was supplied to a setup function.

GXCR_ERR_INVAL_TOKEN_SIZE  Packet processing token is 0 or is too large.
